content.en:
Legend of the ancient city.

Ye Tian brought the corpse of the top legendary-level creature Lin Long, and then slowly refined the blood of the top legend himself.

As the years passed, the blood of the top legend was stripped from the corpse of the dragon, and a blood of the top legend was gradually condensed.

The blood of the top legend is golden blood, and the inside is circulated from the third sequence to the rules of the Dao, which is completely integrated, exuding a terrifying aura, and the phantom of a lin dragon can be faintly seen.

"This is the blood of the top legends!"

Ye Tian sealed it layer by layer, and then put it away.

Although the blood of the top-level legend is very precious, if you want to exchange it for a second-order supreme rule item, it is definitely not enough, even if it is a low-quality second-order supreme rule item, it is almost in the hands of those powerful elders, and even the patriarchs.

He wants to trade with them and is not qualified yet.

"Unless I can get a copy of the Blood of the Mighty Legends!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

But the legendary creature with the blood of the strongest legend is really terrifying, and all his copied bodies are not opponents, but will be killed by the opponent.

And according to his understanding, there are only six legendary creatures in the Legendary Realm that possess the blood of the strongest legends.

Therefore, even if he swept through the Legendary Realm, he would only be able to obtain six copies of the Blood of the Supreme Legend.

First of all, he also had to prepare at least two copies of the blood of the strongest legend, one for himself and one for his son, as for the other family members who did not follow the path of the strongest and the most powerful, the blood of the top legend was enough.

"Killing the legendary creatures with the blood of the strongest legend, with my current strength, it is not enough, I must let the two legendary creatures of the strongest fight each other, and after the heavy damage, I can hope to kill them!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Subsequently.

He began his research and selected two creatures with a Legendary Xeforce.

Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape!

Eight-winged golden cicada!

These two legendary creatures possess the blood of supreme legends, and for a long time, no one dared to provoke them.

According to Ye Tian's understanding, the last time a legendary-level creature with supreme strength in the Legendary Realm was killed, it was before the 300 million Supreme Dao Era, and it was not killed by the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, but by the Supreme Dao Void Demon side.

It is said that in that battle, six hundred of the Nine Noble Dao Void Demons alone fell.

Was it because the Supreme Dao Void Demon mobilized thousands of Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demons from the outside world and combined them into a big battle, and used many hole cards, or was it because the Supreme Legendary creature had just been born and was injured by other Supreme Legendary Creature that he paid such a price to kill him.

Therefore, those who have taken the path of the strongest to the Dao Realm of the Nine Folds Dao Realm actually have no hope of breaking through to the Legendary Dao Realm, and they came to the Legendary Realm to help the forces behind them collect the blood of legends, trying to obtain a large amount of contribution points and accumulate a large amount of credit.

If the forces behind it kill a powerful legendary creature elsewhere in the Void, then they have a chance of obtaining a copy of the blood of the mighty legend.

Therefore, this group of Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm did not expect to obtain a share of the blood of the Supreme Legend from here at all.

But there is no force behind Ye Tian, in the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, except for your own race, you will be given the blood of the strongest legend, and other forces will not be able to give it to you at all, and it will not be exchanged.

So, he can only rely on himself.

......

Legends.

Ten Thousand Blood Ancient Mountain.

This is the territory of the Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape, in addition to the Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape, there are also six descendants of the Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape, who are also legendary creatures, but they are just ordinary legendary creatures.

And for a long time, the Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape was almost invincible in the legendary world, and he had no interest, so he was almost asleep.

However, the descendants of the six thousand-blooded golden apes often bounced around and cultivated.

this day.

Ye Tian sneaked in here and directly attacked one of the descendants of the Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape, and fled after one blow.

This directly angered the descendant of the 10,000-blooded golden ape, and the other party directly pursued and killed Ye Tian.

And Ye Tian attacked this descendant of the 10,000-blooded golden ape, with the purpose of luring it into the territory of the eight-winged golden cicada.

It didn't take long for the descendants of the Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape to chase and kill Ye Tian, so they wanted to return.

As a result, Ye Tian shot directly again and attacked the opponent's special position.

This time, the descendants of the Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape were completely furious.

It continued to chase and kill, all the way to the territory of the eight-winged golden cicada.

Then.

The descendants of the Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape also realized that they had broken into the territory of the Eight-Winged Golden Cicada, and they wanted to escape.

But at the moment.

Ye Tian entangled him and prevented him from escaping.

His strength is already above the other party, so he is naturally not afraid of the other party escaping.

Meanwhile.

Another of his replica bodies broke into the sleeping place of the Eight-Winged Golden Cicada and directly attacked the Eight-Winged Golden Cicada.

......

A dark void.

The eight-winged golden cicada is sleeping here, its breath is constricted, and it seems that there is no deterrence, but if it is close, it can still feel the power of palpitations.

Ye Tian no longer hesitated, and mobilized the third sequence to attack this eight-winged golden cicada.

Rumble!!!!!

A ray of light bombarded the body of the eight-winged golden cicada, but after the light dissipated, there was only one more white spot on the body of the eight-winged golden cicada, and it did not even penetrate the body defense.

"The defenseless state is when the defense is the weakest, and it has not broken its defense, it is worthy of being a legendary creature with the blood of the strongest legend!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Airplanes!

The eight-winged golden cicada opened its eyes, and a terrifying aura permeated it.

"Let's go!"

Ye Tian quickly withdrew.

And the eight-winged golden cicada was completely furious, and an ant dared to attack it.

Swish!

The eight wings spread out, shook slightly, and came out directly from this dark void, chasing towards Ye Tian.

And this time.

Ye Tian had already come to the place where he was fighting with the descendants of the Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape.

Rumble!!!!!

The eight-winged golden cicada had arrived, and the aura of its whole body exploded, and countless golden rays of light enveloped this area.

This was a large-scale attack, which directly hit Ye Tian hard, and also killed the descendant of the 10,000-blooded golden ape in seconds.

Now.

Ten Thousand Blood Ancient Mountain, the Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape has woken up.

It sensed that its descendants had been killed, and the direction of its fall was the eight-winged golden cicada.

Suddenly.

Furious.

Rumble!!!

The 10,000-blooded golden ape awakened, crossed the void step by step, and headed for the territory of the eight-winged golden cicada.

Meanwhile.

Ye Tian also annihilated his copy body, and he didn't need the eight-winged golden cicada to kill.

Soon.

The 10,000-blooded golden ape and the eight-winged golden cicada fought and killed.

"The Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape and the Eight-Winged Golden Cicada may not be killed to the end, but I still slaughtered the other five descendants of the Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape to provoke it again. With just its brain, it will definitely vent its anger on the eight-winged golden cicada. "

Ye Tian was going to do this.
